text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The spectators are enthralled by my<n>running! With
a swarm of reporters in<n>wait, I head to the press
conference<n>room...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Only to find a single journalist... plus<n>Doto! Alas,
the number of poor souls<n>wallowing in an abyss
of despair,<n>ignorant of my presence, appears far
too great!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
My next goal is clear—a rescue. With<n>the
Overlord's gleaming stride, I will<n>turn the nescient
masses into my<n>fans!
